notes: Bring your brotherhood to the letter of marque. Allied pirates can now fight alongside you against faction shipping, not just other pirates — so your privateer hunts become a crew effort. Crews you've told to 🛰️ Follow auto-join a fresh engagement on their own (up to two allies, skipping blood rivals), and any standing-by crew on-site can be summoned into the fight mid-raid. Builds on 2.17-2.19 (tags, locations, call-for-support, follow/stand-down, smuggling runs).
